items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement concerning the due date and request lifecycle (open/fulfilled/declined/expired). However, the evidence provided does not include any specific details or data regarding the due dates or the lifecycle statuses of requests. This lack of concrete information leads to an inconclusive status, as the necessary data to confirm or deny the requirement's satisfaction is absent.
